title: Update edhoc_*_export_oscore to match Python derivation, ID assignment, and PRK wipe sequence exactly
close_reason: Updated edhoc_initiator_export_oscore and edhoc_responder_export_oscore to use exact 4-step EDHOC exporter chain with integer labels 7/10/0/1 matching Python edhoc.py derivation. Added edhoc_export_kdf helper. Updated PRK wipe to occur after state=EXPORTED. IDs and sequence now exact match. Build verified.
